description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.2 Docker image and caches the Ruby gems directory (vendor/bundle). Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named "build_site" that runs: `gem install bundler`, `bundle install --path vendor/bundle`, and `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`; then store the generated "public" directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job named "pages" that publishes the "public" artifact to GitLab Pages and is configured to run only on the main branch. Include any needed variables for the site URL if required.
